fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Fields this transform requires in input. Used for DAG validation to catch missing field errors at config time. For templates, use elspeth.core.templates.extract_jinja2_fields() to discover fields.
fields.label: Required Input Fields
fields.name: required_input_fields

fields.description: Name of the string field to split into lines
fields.label: Source Field
fields.name: source_field

fields.description: Whether to include a line index field
fields.label: Include Index
fields.name: include_index

fields.description: Name for the emitted line index
fields.label: Index Field
fields.name: index_field

fields.description: Maximum number of output lines this transform may emit for one input row
fields.label: Max Lines
fields.name: max_lines
